companies.name: Boon
companies.reason: Boon is revolutionizing water purification by integrating AI and IoT technology into their products, transforming traditional water purifiers into smart wellness devices. They secured $5 million in funding to enhance their AI-enabled water IoT platform.

companies.name: OpenAI
companies.reason: OpenAI launched an innovative AI-image verification tool to authenticate images generated by their AI systems. This tool addresses misinformation and deepfakes, aiming to improve content integrity.
